query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `brandAssets` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`brand` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`category` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`driveFileId` varchar(255),
	`filename` varchar(255),
	`tags` json,
	`cdnUrl` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
	`lastSynced` timestamp,
	`isPrimary` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `brandAssets_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `appSettings` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`settingKey` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`settingValue` text,
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `appSettings_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `appSettings_settingKey_unique` UNIQUE(`settingKey`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `viewTracking` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`dealershipId` int NOT NULL,
	`proposalSlug` varchar(100),
	`visitorIp` varchar(45),
	`userAgent` text,
	`eventType` varchar(30) DEFAULT 'view',
	`timeOnPageSeconds` int,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `viewTracking_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `dealershipSocialLinks` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`dealershipId` int NOT NULL,
	`platform` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
	`url` text NOT NULL,
	`normalizedUrl` text,
	`status` varchar(32) DEFAULT 'unverified',
	`source` varchar(64) DEFAULT 'manual_entry',
	`confidenceScore` varchar(10) DEFAULT '0.50',
	`discoveredAt` timestamp DEFAULT (now()),
	`lastVerifiedAt` timestamp,
	`isPrimary` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`isLocked` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`isGroupLevel` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`isDeleted` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`deletedAt` timestamp,
	`notes` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `dealershipSocialLinks_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `socialLinkEvents` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`dealershipId` int NOT NULL,
	`socialLinkId` int,
	`platform` varchar(32),
	`action` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
	`oldUrl` text,
	`newUrl` text,
	`reason` text,
	`userId` int,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `socialLinkEvents_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
